zh.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux是Richard Molyneux of Melling和Emma Donne of Utkinton的女兒，於1273年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓。她和Hugh de Standish至少有3個兒子。

英国英格兰藍卡爾度波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux是Richard Molyneux of Melling和Emma Donne of Utkinton的女儿，于1273年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓。她和Hugh de Standish至少有3个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux was born in 1273, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Richard Molyneux of Melling and Emma Donne of Utkinton. She had at least 3 sons with Hugh de Standish.

fr.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux est née en 1273, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Richard Molyneux of Melling et Emma Donne of Utkinton. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Hugh de Standish.

de.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux wurde 1273 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Richard Molyneux of Melling und Emma Donne of Utkinton geboren. Sie hatte mit Hugh de Standish mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux è nata il nel 1273 nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Richard Molyneux of Melling e Emma Donne of Utkinton. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Hugh de Standish.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneuxは1273年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでRichard Molyneux of MellingとEmma Donne of Utkintonの娘として生まれた。彼女はHugh de Standishとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux(은)는 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Richard Molyneux of Melling(와)과 Emma Donne of Utkinton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hugh de Standish(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

Duxbury, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux nasceu em 1273, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Richard Molyneux of Melling e Emma Donne of Utkinton. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Hugh de Standish.

ru.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux родилась в 1273 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Richard Molyneux of Melling и Emma Donne of Utkinton. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Hugh de Standish.

es.lifeSummary: Alicia Molyneux nació en 1273, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Richard Molyneux of Melling y Emma Donne of Utkinton. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Hugh de Standish.
